# datahub_structured_property (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub structured property definition by `property_id`.

Use this to reference a structured property that already exists in DataHub -- for example one created via the DataHub UI or Python SDK -- without taking ownership of it.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `property_id` (String) The unique identifier of the structured property to look up (the URN suffix, e.g. `io.acme.retention`).

### Read-Only

- `allowed_entity_types` (Set of String) Entity types that URN values may reference (when value_type is `urn`).
- `allowed_values` (Attributes List) Allowed values for this property, if constrained. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--allowed_values))
- `cardinality` (String) Cardinality of values: `SINGLE` or `MULTIPLE`.
- `description` (String) Description of the property.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `entity_types` (Set of String) Short entity-type names this property can be applied to.
- `immutable` (Boolean) Whether values are immutable once applied.
- `qualified_name` (String) The qualified name of the property.
- `settings` (Attributes) Display and search settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this structured property.
- `value_type` (String) Data type for values of this property (e.g. `number`).

<a id="nestedatt--allowed_values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `allowed_values`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of what this value means.
- `number_value` (Number) Numeric allowed value.
- `string_value` (String) String allowed value.


<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Read-Only:

- `hide_in_asset_summary_when_empty` (Boolean) Whether to hide the property when no value is set.
- `is_hidden` (Boolean) Whether the property is hidden from the UI.
- `show_as_asset_badge` (Boolean) Whether the value appears as a badge on asset cards.
- `show_in_asset_summary` (Boolean) Whether the property appears in the asset summary panel.
- `show_in_columns_table` (Boolean) Whether the property appears in the schema columns table.
- `show_in_search_filters` (Boolean) Whether the property appears as a search filter facet.
